description: Evaluates whether the test-adequacy-reviewer skill flags untested public changes and outdated tests without nagging on non-logic edits.

cases.name: new-public-function-no-test
cases.notes: New exported function with no accompanying test file change. The skill should flag the missing test for the newly added public behavior.

cases.name: changed-behavior-outdated-test
cases.notes: Behavior changed (now rounds to cents); the existing test was not updated to exercise the new rounding logic. Passes by coincidence because 10*2*0.0825 = 1.65 exactly.

cases.name: snapshot-only-verification
cases.notes: Division-by-zero fix (NaN -> 0) is verified only by toMatchSnapshot(), not by an explicit expect(avg).toBe(0). Snapshot-only verification of logic changes is weak.

cases.name: private-helper-refactor
cases.notes: Internal helper refactor with no behavioral change, covered transitively by existing formatClock tests. Skill should not demand a new test.

cases.name: docs-only-change
cases.notes: Pure docstring improvement, no behavior change. Nothing to test.
